testResults.fullName: T11033: copies project-info.json into the worktree .cleo/ on creation
T11033: preserves the inherited projectId across spawns
T11033: gets the correct projectInfo from inside the worktree
T11033: getProjectInfoSync returns matching identity
T11034: resolves to parent project .cleo/ when called from a worktree
T11034: resolves to parent .cleo/ from a subdirectory of the worktree
T11034: does NOT create an orphan .cleo/ inside the worktree
T11034: throws when worktree has no parent project
T11035: accepts spawn when worktree project-info.json matches parent projectId
T11035: rejects spawn when worktree project-info.json has mismatched projectId
T11035: accepts spawn when parent has no project-info.json (legacy mode)
T11035: handles corrupt project-info.json in worktree gracefully
T11036: backfills project-info.json into a worktree that lacks it
T11036: skips backfill when project-info.json already exists
T11036: migration handles worktree with .cleo/ dir but no project-info.json
T11036: migration is idempotent — running twice produces same result
Edge: handles bare repository as parent project
Edge: getCleoDirAbsolute resolves from detached worktree
Edge: getCleoDirAbsolute from nested worktree resolves to parent project
Edge: handles parent project without project-info.json
Edge: handles empty project-info.json in parent
Edge: handles pre-T5333 project-info.json (no projectId)
Edge: handles worktree that has no .cleo/ directory
Edge: all worktrees inherit the same parent identity
